Bios


Bardock: father
Raditz: first son
Gokou: second son

King Vegeta: King of Saiyans
Vegeta: son: Prince of Saiyans
Vegeta Jr.:Desendant of Vegeta and Bulma
Master Roshi: brother
Uranai Baba: sister

Grandpa Gohan:Grandfather
Gokou: father
Chi-Chi: mother
Gohan: first son
Goten: second son
Vegeta: father
Bulma: mother
Trunks: first child, son
Bra: daughter
Cold: father
Coola: first son
Freeza: second son

Ox King: father
Chi-Chi: daughter
Krilyn: father
Android 18: mother
Marron: daughter
Cell: father
Cell Jr.: offspring (7 in all)

Gohan: father
Videl: mother
Pan: daughter
Sataan: father
Videl: daughter
Pan: grandmother
Gokou Jr.: grandson

Bibi-Di: father
Babi-Di: son
Boo

Yamcha:Desert Bandit
PuarYamcha's sidekick
Oolong: Pig
Tenshinhan3-eyed Warrior
ChaozTenshinhan's sidekick
Kami:Earth Gaurdian
PicolloDiamoa's son
Dende
Karin:Cat
Mr. Popo:Kami assistance
Gill:sidekick robot




Bardock: Bardock was Son Gokou's (Kakarott) dad. He was the one who realized what Freeza was up to and tried to do something about it. To read more about Bardock and the whole story vist Bardock Story

Bra:There isn't much on Bra. She was 14 when GT started and when she wants to say something shes straight forward about it.

Babi-Di:She is a little evil magician that looks like a big rat. He is the son of Babi-Di and his goal is to destroy the word just for the hell of it. He unleashes the boo his father created and together they terrorize the Earth. Then Boo and Babi-Di get in to an arguement and eventually boo blows half of his body off.

Bibi-Di:Babi-Di's father only appears in a flashback. Not that much about him only that he created Boo.

Bojack:He appeared in DBZ special movie 9 and Bojack and his minions took over the main event in the Tenkachi Boudaki tournament. His minions were killed and eventually was desroyed by gohan. Read more about this movie in Movies & Specials

Boo:Boo was created by Bibi-Di and was condemned to a fat form. Years later he was summoned again by Babi-Di and went around with Babi-Di terrorizing the Earth. Eventually Boo killed his master and split into two forms. The fat one joined the good guys and helped them fight the evil Boo. The evil Boo went through many stages when absorbing Mystic Gohan, SSJ3 Gokou, Vegetto, Gotenks, Piccolo, and fat Boo. When Boo was destroyed by Gokou's Genki Dama he was reincarnated into Uubu. Check out what happened in the Boo Story

Brolly:Brolly only appeared in the movies 8, 10, 11 and not in the series. Brolly was supposed to be executed by King Vegeta in fear that he would grow too powerful but somehow survived. The bracelets and necklace he wears was suppose to control his power but obviously he overcame that barrier. Ever since he was in the same birth room as Gokou he had and instintal hatred towards him and wanted to destoy him ever since. Then he is killed by Gokou. In the second Brolly movie he somehow survived and then was killed with a combination of Goten, Gokou, and Gohan's Kamehameha. In the third movie his DNA is analyzed and is mutiplied until a form is acheived. This form is Bio Brolly. Bio Brolly is killed by the effect of water on the acid. It hardens and Brolly is killed for good.

Bulma:Bulma met Gokou in Dragonball and aided eachother in finding the Dragonballs. They were with eachother as a team throughout the whole Dragonball Z/GT series. She eventually married Vegeta and had 2 kids... Trunks and Bra. She was part of Capsule Corp... the company which had portable machines in little capsules and owned the only Dragonball radar.

Cell:Cell was created by Dr. Gero in Mirai Trunks' timeline. He killed Trunks and took his time machine in to another timeline. Then he absored Android 18 and became P. Cell (Perfect Cell). He was killed by Gohan. He has the ability to regenerate into his original form with only one brain cell and he can use other peoples energy to become a higher form.

Cell Jr.:Made by Cell they were 7 little offspring made by Cell to try to defeat Gohan. They look like cell but they are little and blue. All 7 were killed by Gohan.

Chaoz:He looks like a little clown and he is Tenshinhans sidekick. He sacrifices him self by clutching on to Nappa and exploding. It doesn't work, but later he is wished back by the Dragonballs.

Chi Chi:She is the daughter of the Ox King and also is the wife of Gokou. Gokou and Chi Chi later get busy and have two kids Gohan and Goten. She was killed during the Boo series but came back to life by the Dragonballs.

Chii-Shenlong:The evil dragon of the 7 star dragonball. This dragon has the ability to absorb. Chii-Shenlong was born when Bulma wished everyone back from the desruction of Majin-Vegeta.

King Cold:He is the father of Freeza and Coola. He repaired Freeza into half flesh half mech. King Cold and Mecca Freeza were killed by Mirai Trunks.

Coola:In the first movie he appeared in (movie 5) it takes us back to the time Kakarott was headed for Earth. In learning that his Brother Freeza was killed by a saiyan, Gokou he is sent out to continue the genicide of the Saiyan race. But Gokou blasted his ass to the sun. In the next movie he appeared (movie 6) he was Mecca Coola. The left over body parts from movie 5 was attached to many parts in space and evolved into a living ship... and guess who was the brain of the ship... the bastard coola himself. So being able to produce many Macca Coolas, Coolas mind was desroyed along with everthing else by Gokou.

Dai-Kaioushin:Dai-Kaioushin was fused with a witch and he has a crystal ball in which he can see whats going on on Earth. He also helped Gohan achieve his Mystic stage.

Dende:Dende is a Nameck that takes the place of Kami as Earth gaurdian when Kami permanently fuses with Piccolo.

Dr. Gero:He is a intellegent scientist of Red Ribbon. He createds all of the Androids to help him on his quest to desroy Gokou, because he desroyed the Reb Ribbon when he was little. He also turns himself into Androind 20. In hell during GT, he teams up with Dr. Myuu and they create Super 17 but later is betrayed by Dr. Myuu and then is killed by Super 17 himself.

Dr. Myuu:Dr. Myuu is an E.T scientist that creates all these robots, even Gill himself. He saved baby in space and helped him regenerate back to normal, but he was betrayed by Baby and was killed. Later on in hell he teamed up with Dr. Gero and made Super 17. He had 17 killed Dr. Gero, but Super 17 was tired of him so 17 killed him too.

Freeza:Freeza is a conquerer and he conquered Planet Plant, also know as planet Vegeta. He used the barbaric Saiyans as his mercinaries to take over other planets. He felt that the Saiyans were going to grow to strong so he was going to blast them using one blast. Everyone was killed except Vegeta, Gokou, Nappa, Brolly, Tauras, and Raditz. Freeza didn't want Vegeta to die because Vegeta was loyal. Read more about the Freeza story in Freeza Story.

Gill:Gill was created by Dr. Myuu and when he was found in GT by Trunks, Gokou, and Pan, he joined them in their journeys.

Gohan:Also know as Mystic Gohan and the Great Saiyaman, Gohan was Gokou and Chi Chi's first son. He was the first on to turn Super Saiyan 2. Later he married Videl and had a little daughter named Pan.

Gokou: main character of Dragonball-Z-GT and Bardock's son (Saiyan name: Kakarot) who was sent to destroy Earth. He was found in Mount Paozu by Grandpa Gohan and banged his head on a rock as a baby. Thus, he forgot about his Saiyan quest and trained under his grandpa. Then he trained under Master Roshi and Kami. Next, he learned under Kaiou. He married Chi-Chi and became the father of Gohan and Goten. He was killed fighting Raditz, wished back with the dragonballs, killed again when Cell exploded, and came back to life when Dai-Kaioushin gave up his life so that Gokou could live to fight Boo. Gokou can reach SSJ1, SSJ2, and SSJ3 level. He can also reach Super Gokou 4 level. Gokou is considered the true Saiyan who appears every 1000 years. In addition, he has fused with Vegeta to become Vegetto and Gozita! At the end of Dragonball GT, Gokou rode on Shenlong, fused with the dragonballs, and disappeared.

Gokou Jr.:grandson of Pan. He appeared in the TV special on March 25, 1997. This coward gained courage and gathered the dragonballs to make a wish to heal his dying grandmother. At the end of Dragonball GT, Gokou Jr. appears again.

Goten:Goten is Gokou and Chi Chi's second son. He is able to turn Super Saiyan at such an early age. He also fuses with Trunks to form.............GOTENKS............

Gotenks:It the result of Goten and Trunks doing "Fushion". They have the ability to turn Super Saiyan and Super Saiyan 3.

Gogeta:It is the result of Vegeta and Gokou doing Fushion. It occured in movie 12. It took them a couple times to master. They messed up twice.

Krilyn:He is a Shoalan monk who trained with Gokou and Kamesennin. Later he married Androind 18 and had a girl, Marron.

Master Roshi a.k.a Kame-senin:Turtle Elder. He and Tsuru-sennin trained under the same master, but they became enemies because Tsuru-sennin was evil and because they fell in love with the same girl. Master Roshi assumed the title as the world's strongest man when he won a Tenkaichi Boudoukai tournament. Later, he trained the Ox-King and Granpa Gohan. Years later, he trained Gokou, Klilyn, and Yamcha. Master Roshi also has an identity as Jackie Chun. Unfortunately, Master Roshi is a perverted man.

Pan: daughter of Gohan and Videl. This one-fourth Saiyan teenager wanted to prove herself and tagged along most of the adventures in Dragonball GT.

Piccolo:evil son of Daimoa. He fought Gokou in a Tenkaichi Boudoukai to revenge his father but was defeated. A few years later, he allied with Gokou, trained Gohan, and became good. Piccolo was killed by Nappa but restored with the Namek dragonballs. He also fused permanently with Nail and Kami. Piccolo was killed again when the Earth exploded in the Baby Series. In heaven, Piccolo purposely caused trouble to be sent to hell to help Gokou return to Earth in Dragonball GT.

Chibi Trunks:son of Vegeta and Bulma. He was able to reach Super Saiyan level at a young age and can fuse with Goten to become Gotenks. In Dragonball GT, he journeyed with Gokou and Pan in search of the Black Star dragonballs.

Future Trunks:future Trunks who travelled back in time in hope to alter the future. He grew up in a world where Gokou died from a heart attack. Because Gokou was dead, no one was able to defeat Androids 17 and 18. The Androids killed the rest of the Z warriors and terrorized the world. Future Trunks travelled back in time to give Gokou medicine to prevent death from the heart attack. Upon arrival, Trunks killed Freeza and his crew. Later, he was killed by Cell but was revived by a wish from the dragonballs. Afterwards, Future Trunks returned to the future, which remained unchanged, and easily killed Androids 17 and 18 because of his training in the "present" timeline. At the same time, Cell was about to steal Trunks' time machine, but Trunks eaily killed form 1 Cell.

Vegeta:evil Prince of the Saiyans who grew up following Freeza's orders to conquer other planets. Vegeta was defeated for the first time by Gokou and retreated (Vegeta Series). Then, he allied with the Z warriors in battling Freeza in the Freeza Series, Vegeta easily gets jealous at other warriors because he wanted to be the strongest. Vegeta also vows that Kakarot's life belongs to him. In the Cell Series, Vegeta reaches SSJ level for the first time. Vegeta officially became one of the good guys in the Boo Series, when he realized that Gokou is stronger. In the Boo Series, he became one of Babi-di's zombies, Majin-Vegeta, and self-destructed in hope of destroying Boo. He was revived by King Yama to fight Boo. Vegeta also fuses with Gokou to become Vegetto. In Dragonball GT, Baby took over his body and he became Vegeta-Bebi. Then, he reaches SSJ4 level for the first time, and fused with Super Gokou 4 to become Gozita once again (since Movie 12)!

Yamcha:Road bandit/robber with a shyness towards girls. He befriended our heroes, loss his shyness, and became one of the good guys. In the Vegeta Series, Yamcha was killed by a Saiba-man, but revived with a wish from the dragonballs.

Videl:Sataan's daughter. She joined Gohan in crime fighting and became part of the Great Saiyan-man team. Later, she married Gohan and had a daughter, Pan.
